variants: Chaimae Serghini resides in Fountaincrest Bridge after being born in Golden Orchard. She is a graduate of Riverpine Business College, where she focused on Esperanto grammar during her studies. Currently, she works at Zenith Sable Advisors, putting her knowledge of Esperanto grammar to good use in her professional role. Chaimae's education has equipped her well for the demands of her position and contributes to the team's success.
